entries.title: Release Notes Workspace in Admin
entries.description: Platform admins can now create, edit, publish, and email release notes from a dedicated admin workspace with entry ordering and preview support.

entries.title: Release Notes JSON Import and Export
entries.description: Release notes can now be exported to JSON and imported back into the platform for backup, migration, and collaborative editing workflows.

entries.title: Cross-Tenant Sync Management
entries.description: Platform teams now have a unified sync management view across tenants, including connection status, trigger controls, and sync history visibility.

entries.title: Insight Feedback Operations
entries.description: New insight feedback tooling supports review workflows, training example management, and experimentation for improving insight quality over time.

entries.title: Platform User Analytics
entries.description: Expanded analytics capabilities provide better visibility into user behavior, adoption, and activity trends across the platform.

entries.title: Tenant Configuration Transfer Improvements
entries.description: Tenant configuration import/export now includes stronger validation and safer transfer controls to simplify moving setup between environments.
